name: Grease Monkey Grand Prix
short_description: Start your engines, then fix them! Grease Monkey Grand Prix is a retro-styled party racer with style, edge and most of all, blazing speed! In a world where companies are too cheap to hire mechanics, fixing your car as you try and reach the end of the track is up to you!
detailed_description:
Are you Ready for Grease Monkey Grand Prix?

Race the most chaotic race of all time, the Grease Monkey Grand Prix, where you are your own one-man team of pitstop and racer. After your grandpa breaks his back, you must fill in for him, there’s not much you need to learn and train, right?

One Man Pitstop

Play Minigames while racing to gain a minigame-appropriate Power-up and risk the chance of failing, where you will gain a power down. Are you able to multitask and gain the Title of Grease Monkey, or will you fall between the cracks of obscurity?

Example:

 Pick up the Minigame Box

 The slot machine will choose a minigame (e.g. TNT Minigame)

 Mash Minigame Prompt to succeed, which drops a bomb behind you

 Enemy Racer Hits Bomb and Explodes.

 Fail the minigame, and instead you’ll blow up.

Which Car will you pick?

A variety of cars with different Stats to pick from.

Race your Ghost

Your after-image ghost of your fastest lap will show up every race. can you beat yourself, or is that the best you can do?

Race your Friends

Yes, Couch Co-op is included.

Retro Aesthetics

CRT? Check. Cell-Shading? Check. It looks gorgeous, and it took a long time to make.
